import os
paper_dir = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1016_j.neuron.2016.02.013'
for fname in ['paper_text.txt', 'text_part1.txt', 'text_part2.txt', 'text_part3.txt']:
    fpath = os.path.join(paper_dir, fname)
    if os.path.exists(fpath):
        os.remove(fpath)
        print('Removed:', fpath)
